title: Add nullable wait checkpoint object before behavior changes.
summary: loop-cli exposes nextRunAt and remainingDelayMs in durable loop state; OUR deep-research config/session schema should add an optional wait checkpoint object before any resume behavior depends on it.
whyItHelps: Lets resume logic distinguish ordinary active sessions from sessions that crashed during an intentional wait.

title: Persist wait checkpoints at an explicit pre-dispatch wait boundary.
summary: loop-cli persists when the controller enters waiting and refreshes remaining delay after chunks. OUR fan-out runtime should write a mutable atomic wait snapshot beside the append-only status ledger, because a decreasing remainingDelayMs does not fit ledger-only storage.
whyItHelps: Creates a durable persist point that can be overwritten atomically while keeping status-ledger events explanatory and append-only.

title: Add resume-waiting branch before ordinary resume.
summary: loop-cli restart reloads persisted timing state and first-run delay uses nextRunAt minus current time. OUR step_classify_session should classify valid waiting checkpoints separately and sleep only the remaining wall-clock delay before phase_loop dispatch.
whyItHelps: Prevents immediate duplicate dispatch after a crash during wait and avoids restarting the full interval.

title: Treat missing wait fields as null for old packets.
summary: loop-cli optional state restore and storage migration show the compatibility rule: new wait fields must not be required for old sessions. OUR classifier should leave missing wait fields on the ordinary resume path and activate resume-waiting only for a valid waiting checkpoint.
whyItHelps: Avoids invalidating in-flight packets created before the wait-checkpoint schema exists.

summary: OUR auto workflow currently reads state, checks pause/convergence, and dispatches; there is no explicit sleep interval between iterations, so persisted delay is useful only after adding cadence/backoff semantics or for fan-out retry scheduling.
fanout-pool appendStatusLedger writes append-only JSONL rows; a loop-cli-style remainingDelayMs value changes over time, so it needs a mutable atomic snapshot in addition to ledger events.
